mechanism: A major food price shock forces the Fed to choose between tightening (worsening doom loop), accommodating (de-anchoring expectations), or financial repression. The trilemma pushes toward formal adoption of the financial repression channel, accelerating the modal outcome.
regime_dependence: Only operative under fiscal dominance conditions. In normal regimes, the Fed can tighten without fiscal consequences. The channel operates primarily through EM intermediation.
